Chapter C2
Communicating Nodes

This appendix specifies, for each packet type, the nodes that communicate using that packet type. It contains the
following sections:
• C2.1 Request communicating nodes
• C2.2 Snoop communicating nodes
• C2.3 Response communicating nodes
• C2.4 Data communicating nodes
